members.name: Neha Manoj Shah
members.bio: Neha is the creative force behind 7th Ivory's visual identity. As Art Director and Production Designer, she brings a meticulous eye for detail and a passion for crafting clean, modern, and classy aesthetics. Her work on 'African Space Makers VR' was showcased at the 77th Venice International Film Festival, and her short film 'Love Sweet Sound' won Best Fiction Short Film at the Motion Pictures International Film Festival.

members.name: Ahmed Saleem Deen
members.bio: Ahmed brings stories to life through his dual expertise in directing and editing. His collaborative work on 'Love Sweet Sound' showcases his ability to craft emotionally resonant narratives that challenge perceptions and inspire change. He has edited multiple short films for 7th Ivory including 'Macho Nne' and 'Face Mask for Sale'.

values.title: Quality Storytelling
values.description: We believe in stories that matter—narratives that alter perceptions and create lasting change.

values.title: African Excellence
values.description: Rooted in Kenya, reaching the world. We showcase the best of African creativity on global stages.

values.title: Innovation
values.description: From traditional film to immersive VR, we embrace new technologies to tell stories in groundbreaking ways.

values.title: Impact
values.description: Every project we take on has purpose—whether it's empowering communities or elevating brands.
